title: 第 24 課｜分子振動：自由度數與簡正模態｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
分子的原子不只會振動，整個分子還能平移與轉動。本課先數自由度：n 個原子有 3n 個自由度，扣掉平移與轉動後，非直線分子有 3n−6 個振動、直線分子有 3n−5 個。接著以直線三原子分子為例，用動畫呈現三種簡正模態：對稱伸縮 ωₛ = √(k/m₁)、反對稱伸縮 ωₐ = √(kμ/(m₁m₂))，以及兩重簡併的彎曲模態。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 24 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 24 | Vibrations of Molecules: Normal Modes | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
A molecule's atoms not only vibrate — the whole molecule can translate and rotate. This lesson counts the degrees of freedom: n atoms give 3n, and after removing translation and rotation a non-linear molecule has 3n−6 vibrations, a linear one 3n−5. Then, for a linear triatomic molecule, three normal modes are animated: the symmetric stretch ωₛ = √(k/m₁), the antisymmetric stretch ωₐ = √(kμ/(m₁m₂)), and the doubly degenerate bending mode.

Lesson 24 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
